scripts.build:parcel: parcel build ./src/index.html --public-url /notebook/ && mv dist docs && cp -r notebooks docs/notebooks
scripts.build:dev: parcel build ./src/index.html --public-url / --no-optimize && mv dist docs && cp -r notebooks docs/notebooks
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:parcel
scripts.start: npm run clean && npm run build:dev && http-server docs
